Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 
— Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment research files. The guide includes several ways for users 
to quickly find the information they need: 

• A complete listing of all
